message:
Running command: # The log hasn't grown. Let me check what the python process is doing
ps aux | grep nc_verify | grep -v grep
echo "---"
# Check what subprocess it launched
ps aux | grep iverilog | grep -v grep | head -5
echo "---"
# Check strace briefly
ls -la /proc/$(ps aux | grep nc_verify | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)/fd/ 2>/dev/null | head -10
